title: Realistic Woods
description: The default wood textures are somewhat boring and repetitive. Do you think you need a change?
body:
![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/REALISTIC_WOODS/MP_REALISTIC_WOODS_Header.webp) The default wood textures are somewhat boring and repetitive. Do you think you need a change? Maybe then this resourcepack is ideal for you, we have tried to create a little more realistic and interesting textures. Of course, it won't just change the texture of the wooden logs! Everything that can be created with those trunks will also undergo the same aesthetic changes. Without a doubt, it is a very good option if you want to change the texture of the wood in Minecraft. The designer of these textures and models is AviArt. ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. **[With the code "Lupin" you will get a 25% discount! Click here!](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)** ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/REALISTIC_WOODS/MP_REALISTIC_WOODS_Description.webp) This Minecraft resource pack revamps the default wood textures, which can feel bland and repetitive, into something more vibrant and engaging. Looking for a change? This pack is perfect for you. We've crafted more realistic and captivating textures that not only enhance wooden logs but also extend to all items made from them, like planks, stairs, fences, and more. It's an excellent choice to refresh the look of wood in your Minecraft world, adding a fresh and visually striking touch to your builds. ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/REALISTIC_WOODS/MP_REALISTIC_WOODS_Faq.webp) ### Does it work on servers? ### Sure! Remember that the best way to play with mods and friends is with BisectHosting, and by **[clicking on this link you can get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin).** ### Can this resourcepack be used in modpacks? ### Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/REALISTIC_WOODS/MP_REALISTIC_WOODS_Screenshots.webp) ![Screenshots 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4Tjpn35e/images/10f38c540e84bf949795e707f2f69dae51f597e4.jpeg) ![Screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4Tjpn35e/images/386faebf175ecba4e6b0940bf268b86feb89b197.jpeg)
